title: RoleManifest
description: Protocol-owned role manifest family. Security-sensitive capability expansion must be explicit, signed, versioned, and bound to a shared principal identity.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for role manifests.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this role manifest.

principal.description: Shared principal identity for the role or daemon this manifest governs so later approvals and audit events bind to the same identity object.

role_family.description: Top-level role family this manifest configures.

role_kind.description: Concrete least-privilege role kind this manifest configures.

approval_profile.description: Approval profile selected as a signed manifest input for this role. MVP currently allows only the moderate profile.

capability_opt_ins.description: Explicit capability opt-ins enabled by this signed role manifest. An empty array is the intentional signed no-capabilities posture.

items.description: Stable capability identifier explicitly enabled by the manifest.

allowlist_refs.description: Digest references to allowlist artifacts bound into the manifest signature input.

items.description: Digest reference to an allowlist artifact consumed by this manifest.

signatures.description: Detached signatures attesting to the exact manifest contents.

items.description: Detached signature block for the manifest payload.
